content:
# Safaniya Field

**Summary**: A large offshore oil field in the northern part of the Arabian Gulf.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] focused on the Saf10269 - Geostatistical modeling of Safaniya reservoir in Safaniya field.pdf study area to model its internal heterogeneity.

- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] conducted a modeling study on the Safaniya field to improve well planning.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] produced by uplift movements of deep seated basement faults

- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] conducted a modeling study on the Safaniya field to improve well planning.

## Formations Present

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] Safaniya Member, Wasia Formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Safaniya Field is located in the northwestern part of Saudi Arabia within the Arabian Gulf. It is the largest offshore oil field in the world. ([[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997, p. 20]])

- The area of interest was limited to the northern part due to computational constraints. ([[2013-atig|atig, 2013, p. 47]])
